name: New American Funding - Alexander Mignone
description_short: New American Funding Branch Manager Alexander Mignone offers mortgage origination services including home purchase loans, refinancing, and down payment assistance programs in the Charlotte, NC area.
description_long:
Alexander Mignone is a Branch Manager at New American Funding, a mortgage lending company operating under NMLS #1985463. He is based in Charlotte, North Carolina at the Coliseum Centre Drive location and serves clients seeking home financing solutions. New American Funding positions itself as a dedicated mortgage lender with extensive experience in residential home loan origination.

New American Funding offers a comprehensive suite of mortgage services including conventional home purchase mortgages, refinancing options, FHA and VA loans, and reverse mortgages. The company provides mortgage calculators to help borrowers estimate monthly payments, determine affordable home prices, and review amortization schedules. They offer the "Pathway to Homeownership" initiative, which provides qualified first-time homebuyers in select areas up to $6,000 in non-repayable down payment assistance. Additionally, the company offers "NAF Cash," enabling borrowers to make competitive cash offers and close in as little as seven days without contingency on financing.

New American Funding differentiates itself through its "NAF360" corporate culture initiative emphasizing trust, community involvement, and comprehensive client support. The company has achieved a 4.9 out of 5 rating based on 269,421 customer reviews, indicating substantial market presence and customer satisfaction. They also operate NAF Connect, a platform designed for real estate professionals to streamline loan processing, gain real-time loan status updates, and access co-branded marketing materials. The company provides educational content on housing topics including reverse mortgage inheritance implications and fair housing practices.

While New American Funding demonstrates solid credentials and customer ratings, borrowers should note that specific loan terms, rates, and eligibility requirements are not detailed on this profile page. The down payment assistance program is limited to select designated areas, and NAF Cash availability depends on individual borrower qualification. Prospective clients should contact Alexander Mignone directly to discuss current loan products, competitive rates, and whether they qualify for specialty programs.

Buyers needing rapid closing timelines and ability to make competitive cash offers through NAF Cash
diagnosis: New American Funding through Branch Manager Alexander Mignone is best suited for homebuyers in the Charlotte, NC area seeking comprehensive mortgage services, particularly first-time buyers who may qualify for down payment assistance programs or those considering refinancing. The main caveat is that specific loan terms, rates, and eligibility criteria are not disclosed on this profile page—interested borrowers must contact Mignone directly to compare offerings and confirm qualification for specialty programs like Pathway to Homeownership.
